title: Internal error on empty generate-for loop with -O0

features.name: empty generate-for loop with genvar iterating zero times
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop using genvar that iterates zero times (loop bound comparison against zero)
features.snippet:
genvar sva_i;
for(sva_i= 0; sva_i<0; sva_i=sva_i+1) begin end

features.name: genvar for loop with O0 optimization flag
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop with genvar that is compiled with -O0 optimization level
features.snippet:
genvar i;
for(i=0; i<0; i=i+1) begin end
